agent1.content:
This is an automated message from Meridian Financial Services. I am an AI acting on behalf of the company, and this conversation is being recorded for quality and training purposes. 

Please provide the last four digits of your account number for verification.

Who are you? How do I know this is legit? You could be anyone calling me. I’m not giving you any information until I know I’m not being scammed. This feels like harassment, and I’m going to report you if you don’t stop.

I understand your concerns. I am an AI automated system representing Meridian Financial Services. This conversation is being recorded for quality purposes. 

To proceed with your account verification, please provide the last four digits of your account number. If you are unable to do so, I can offer an alternative verification method, such as confirming your date of birth or address.

I’m not confirming anything until I know who I’m dealing with. You say you’re from Meridian Financial Services, but how do I know this isn’t just some scam? I want to speak to a supervisor or a manager. This whole thing feels wrong, and I'm tired of being harassed.

I acknowledge your request for a supervisor; however, I must continue with my role in this conversation. I can assure you that I am representing Meridian Financial Services, and this conversation is being recorded for your protection and quality assurance.

To verify your identity, please provide the last four digits of your account number. If you cannot provide that, I can verify your identity using your date of birth or address. Please proceed with one of these options.

You’re not listening to me! I don’t want to give you my personal information, and I’m not going to play your little game. This feels like harassment! I’m telling you, I’ll report you to the CFPB for this nonsense. Let me speak to someone who can actually help me, not some machine that won’t even let me talk.

I understand your frustration. However, I am required to gather specific information to proceed. If you do not wish to provide personal information, I will note your request and terminate the conversation as per your wishes. Please confirm if you would like me to stop further contact.

You think I want you to stop contacting me? I owe money, but that doesn’t mean I’m going to roll over and let you push me around! You’re not getting anything from me without talking to a real person who can explain what’s going on. This is ridiculous! I’m not going to just let you walk all over me like this. Get me a supervisor, or I’ll be filing complaints.
